calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court waves the minor defect in the date of the restated and amended trust referenced in the revised Attachment 8 to the petition that was attached to the supplement filed on June 12th 2025.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 29, 2021 is admitted to probate. Evan Christensen is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 04, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported.
